published_prior_art.cite: MogstadSantosTorgovitsky2018 and HanYang2024: finite Bernstein/LP sharp-bounds machinery for MTE/PRTE weighted averages.

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_dose_response_iv_v1 and pid_ordinal_late_partial_defiers_v1 are orthogonal partial-ID LP/coupling proposals; doc/API.md Section 3 has no multi-binary-IV MTE support-equivalence entry.

published_prior_art.cite: MogstadSantosTorgovitsky2018 and HanYang2024 already give convex/LP PRTE bounds; the quotient-face diagnostic is not explicitly stated as a multi-IV theorem.
Goff2024 identifies vector-monotone LATE-type parameters but does not compare them to PRTE quotient-face residual width.

novelty_flags.label: Proposal tier
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship; the current flagship is a finite LP/convex-geometry diagnostic adjacent to MogstadSantosTorgovitsky2018 and HanYang2024, not yet a regime-opening sharp bound, strict extension left open by prior work, or iff frontier between named estimators.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The abstract and Introduction sell a quotient cone generated by observed chords, but the formal equivalence is only zero feasible-face width, a_star in N_F; the chord cone or convex-mixture condition appears only in the separate moreover clause.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: Clause (i) quantifies over every feasible right-hand side in the local model, while rho_star(P), F(P), and N_F(P) are defined for the observed b(P); fixed-P face equivalence and uniform-in-b equivalence are different statements.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Rewrite Conjecture 1 into two precise statements: zero-width exact identification on the observed feasible face, and genuine policy-mixture support equivalence requiring a_star in conv{a_c}+N_F; state which is the novelty kernel.

To reach flagship tier, extend the criterion beyond the common scalar-index regime to the MTW partial-monotonicity/mutual-consistency model, or prove a strictly tighter sharp bound/frontier that Han-Yang and MST do not already imply.
Add a worked m=2, K=1 or K=2 nondegenerate example computing A, L_F, N_F, rho_star, and W_F, including a vector-monotone LATE identified case with positive PRTE width.

recommended_next_step: Redraft the flagship conjecture so the cone condition, fixed-face residual, and tier-raising contribution are mathematically the same claim.
